name: PHASE-53 D4 S367 — relevance floor triggers ONE targeted discovery: a claim WITH first-pass chunks but best relevance 0.4472 < RELEVANCE_FLOOR_MEDIUM (0.60) fires exactly one targeted search (query = the claim text) and is lifted via KEEP-BEST to 0.7071 (MEDIUM); a same-doc claim already at relevance 1.0 (≥ floor) triggers NO search. floor_checked/floor_below counters correct; claim-granular floor_claims record {trigger:floor, attempted, lifted, !below_floor} per R-2.
